PLAINTIFF KNEW ABOUT THIRD PARTIES' INVOLVEMENT IN THE SUBJECT MATTER OF THIS CASE AND APPARENTLY CONTEMPLATED DEPOSING THEM LONG BEFORE DISCOVERY CUT-FF. SEE FELLER DECLARATION PARAGRAPH 3. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY (CONTINUED)
Off Calendar Jun-04-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-04-2013 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-03-2013 Continued To Jun-04-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Quash Or Modify Trial Subpoena
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Fred Martin Feller, Esq. (510-548-7474) for Ramona Scott, defendant and moving party / Mark Hooshmand, Esq. (415-318-5709) appearing through court call for Anna Truong, plaintiff and opposing party

ARGUED - After hearing the oral arguments, Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT RAMONA SCOTT's Motion To Quash Or Modify Trial Subpoena and Request for Sanctions is taken under submission. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, D501.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Production Of Records Under Possession, Custody And Control Of Deft To Allow Depositions Beyond Discovery Cut Off; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Hoosmand, Esq. (415-318-5709) for Anna Truong, plaintiff and moving party / Fred Feller, Esq. (415-318-5709) for Ramona Scott, defendant and opposing party

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments, tentative ruling is adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF ANNA TRUONG and TUYEN TRUONG's Motion For Production Of Records Under Possession, Custody And Control Of Deft To Allow Depositions Beyond Discovery Cut Off; Request For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED as to the e-mail, letter or document, at issue, if such e-mail has not been yet produced. Denied as to depositions and any additional production from third parities. Plaintiff knew about third parties' involvement in the subject matter of this case and apparently contemplated deposing them long before discovery cut-ff. See Feller Declaration paragraph 3. Proposed order to be submitted approved as to form. Judge Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Set For Trial On Jun-03-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
